languages.text: "Отнять аугмент. Священная машина должна приносить пользу, а не использоваться вместо костыля".

traits.locale_text: "Отнять аугмент. Священная машина должна приносить пользу, а не использоваться вместо костыля".

languages.text: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."
languages.original_text: "Отнять аугмент. Священная машина должна приносить пользу, а не использоваться вместо костыля".

traits.locale_text: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."
"Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."
"Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."

languages.text: 「増幅器を外せ。聖なる機械は杖としてではなく、善き使途に充てられるべきだ」
languages.original_text: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."

traits.locale_text: 「増幅器を外せ。聖なる機械は杖としてではなく、善き使途に充てられるべきだ。」

languages.text: "Ogmenti sökün. Kutsal bir makine, koltuk değneği olarak kullanılmak yerine amaca uygun bir şekilde kullanılmalı."
languages.original_text: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."

traits.locale_text: "Ogmenti sökün. Kutsal bir makine, koltuk değneği olarak kullanılmak yerine amaca uygun bir şekilde kullanılmalı."

languages.text: «Retiren su aumento. Las máquinas sagradas deben utilizarse como es debido, no como soporte».
languages.original_text: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."

traits.locale_text: «Retiren su aumento. Las máquinas sagradas deben utilizarse como es debido, no como soporte».

languages.text: “移除植入物。神圣的机械应当物尽其用，而不是被拿来当拐杖使。”
languages.original_text: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."

traits.locale_text: “移除植入物。神圣的机械应当物尽其用，而不是被拿来当拐杖使。”

languages.text: « Retirez les augmentations. Une machine sacrée doit être utilisée à bon escient, pas employée comme une vulgaire béquille. »
languages.original_text: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."

traits.locale_text: « Retirez les augmentations. Une machine sacrée doit être utilisée à bon escient, pas employée comme une vulgaire béquille. »

languages.text: "Entfernt die Augmentation. Eine heilige Maschine sollte dem Guten dienen, nicht als Krücke missbraucht werden."
languages.original_text: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."

traits.locale_text: "Entfernt die Augmentation. Eine heilige Maschine sollte dem Guten dienen, nicht als Krücke missbraucht werden."
